antipattern.description: Strategy uses 'feels good' or 'reviewer approval' instead of numeric gates.
antipattern.reason: Decisions become irreproducible and political. Detector: gates block missing numbers. Fix: r1-explicit-gates.

antipattern.description: Running the same full-Triad eval per PR and per weekly check.
antipattern.reason: Either too slow per PR or too cheap weekly. Detector: per_pr == per_release. Fix: r2-tiered-runs.

antipattern.description: Launch gates defined but no rollback criteria.
antipattern.reason: Asymmetric ratchet: easy to launch, hard to revert. Detector: rollback block empty. Fix: r4-rollback-criteria.
